gaps.title: Missing local paper bot runner
gaps.reason: Trading Lab needs a local paper-only runner before stronger workflow demos.
gaps.next_action: Plan runner in DRY_RUN before any backend edit.

gaps.title: Missing chart panel with local candle fixture
gaps.reason: The dashboard needs a local chart fixture before any real market connection is considered.
gaps.next_action: Plan chart panel using fixture candles only.

gaps.title: TradingView and TradersPost need external handoff plan, not login embed
gaps.reason: External platforms must stay outside AI_OS login and credential handling.

gaps.title: Business setup checklist for Play Store organization route missing
gaps.reason: Business setup needs a checklist without legal claims or account automation.
gaps.next_action: Draft checklist in product docs only after approval.

gaps.title: Multi-agent runtime has no real LLM worker adapter yet
gaps.reason: This phase intentionally avoids external LLM framework installs.
gaps.next_action: Keep worker adapter as a future boundary plan.
